basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Recruitment 2026: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority has released the official notification for 1 Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer recruitment is 02 July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or the Institute of Cost and Works Accountants of India. Additionally, fifteen years of experience in an executive cadre in finance or accounting within an industrial, commercial, or government undertaking is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 100000 to Rs. 260000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer in the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, evaluated through Annual Performance Appraisal Reports (APARs) with a benchmark of 'Very Good', and further assessment by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the crucial date for determining eligibility?
faq.answer: The crucial date for determining eligibility for this recruitment is 01 January 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for candidates based in Tamil Nadu, with the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority located in Tuticorin.
